get.summary: Read a greenhouse's planning context (Phase 3 optimizer read path)
get.description: One bounded read of a greenhouse's planning context for the optimizer's Data Access component (catalog #7, RFC-008 revised 2026-07-07): current setpoints, bucketed telemetry history as (min, mean, max) summaries, latest actuator states, and the data-quality/freshness signals the input gate runs before planning. The trailing `window` is resolved server-side against the greenhouse's latest stored (simulated) timestamp; `interval` sets the summary bucket width. The response `from`/`to` report the resolved span and `schema_version` is the drift signal the optimizer's identity-consistency check reads. The platform may back this handler with internal SQL views or TimescaleDB continuous aggregates — those are implementation details, not part of the contract. Read-only: it carries no authority and is unauthenticated on the trusted Docker network (RFC-011 scopes service auth to the write boundaries). An unknown window/interval is rejected 422.

200.description: The greenhouse's planning context over the resolved window.
